resolved_issues.title: MULTIPLE POTENTIALLY OPEN DEEDS OF TRUST — LARGELY RESOLVED
resolved_issues.resolution: Of 5 originally flagged DOTs, document review confirms: 2 secure different properties (not liens on subject), 1 document unavailable (ignored), leaving only 2 on subject (1 confirmed open + 1 potentially open).

resolved_issues.title: $150,000 HELOC — CONFIRMED RECONVEYED
resolved_issues.resolution: Reconveyed by Quicken Loans 11/16/2020 via Inst. #2020000670636. Duplicate reconveyance #2020000670635 also filed. Companion DOT ($408,402) reconveyed via #2020000666908.

resolved_issues.title: THREE TRUST DEEDS IN 34 DAYS — RESOLVED
resolved_issues.resolution: The three Empire DOTs secure three DIFFERENT properties across the Mastrangelo investment portfolio: (1) 148 S Auburn Heights Ln ($507,500), (2) subject ($573,400), (3) 55 Sapphire, Irvine ($303,600). Not unusual for investment property financing.

resolved_issues.title: PRE-ACQUISITION ASSIGNMENT — RESOLVED
resolved_issues.resolution: The Quicken→Schwab assignment references the $150K HELOC which is confirmed reconveyed Nov 2020.

examiner_recommendations.detail: This is the single most important remaining task. Download this 1-page document from OC Recorder to determine which DOT it releases. If it releases the Empire DOT (#2021000262319, $573,400), the subject has only one active lien ($250K Partners FCU HELOC).
Confirm the referenced trust with Co-Trustees ANTHONY MARIO and JO ANNE is a different entity than the subject trust.
Verify 2025-2026 tax payment status at taxbill.octreasurer.gov using APN 363-313-04.
Perform judgment search at OC Superior Court and CA SOS (UCC) for both borrowers.
Obtain a full CLTA/ALTA title insurance commitment before any transaction.

observations.detail: Long-term owners. Financing history spans 25+ years: Partners FCU (1999, reconveyed 2003); ABN AMRO ($322,700, 2003); HELOC ($250K, 2005); Citibank ($417K, 2015); Partners FCU HELOC ($150K, 2016, reconveyed 2017); Quicken ($408,402 + $150K HELOC, 2017, both reconveyed 11/2020); Quicken ($575K, 2020, reconveyed 04/2021). All prior liens confirmed reconveyed.

The Quicken Loans HELOC (Inst. 2017000134002, $150K, assigned to Schwab) was reconveyed by Quicken on 11/16/2020 via Inst. 2020000670636 and duplicate 2020000670635. Both reference the assignment to Schwab (Doc 2017000154868). Companion DOT (Inst. 2017000134001, $408,402) also reconveyed via 2020000666908.

Mastrangelos own at least 3 properties through the trust: (1) subject at 5915 E Calle Principia, (2) 148 S Auburn Heights Ln, Anaheim (APN 938-286-37), (3) 55 Sapphire, Irvine (APN 932-027-68). Previously held 116 Greenmoor, Irvine. Total Empire of America financing across portfolio: $1,384,500.
Three lending relationships on subject property: (1) DOT from 1999, reconveyed 2003; (2) $150K HELOC from 2016, reconveyed 2017; (3) current $250K HELOC from 01/2026.

Partners FCU HELOC ($250K) recorded 02/13/2026. LOANLINER product. 20-year term. Dual capacity — individual AND trustee. Reconveyance #2026000053382 recorded 10 days later likely releases a prior lien refinanced by this HELOC.
2025 Affidavit names different co-trustees (ANTHONY MARIO / JO ANNE). Most likely a different Mastrangelo Family Trust. Document review recommended.
